summary: Completed testing of Location Browsing feature (Judete/Localitati/SIRUTA hierarchy). All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend navigation and features working correctly with minor loading delay.

backend_judete_list: Response contains total and judete array
Each judet has name, slug, company_count
backend_judet_localities: Each locality has name, slug, company_count
backend_locality_companies: Response contains judet, localitate, companies, pagination
Each company has cui, denumire, slug + optional fields
Search by CUI 37044065 returns 1 result (S.O.S. UTILAJE CO S.R.L.)
Pagination works (different companies on different pages)
frontend_judete_page: /judete page loads with title 'Firme din Romania pe judete'
42 county cards displayed as clickable links
frontend_judet_page: /judet/harghita page loads with title 'Firme din Harghita'
frontend_localitate_page: /judet/harghita/toplita page loads with title 'Firme din Toplița, Harghita'
Companies table with columns: Denumire, CUI, CAEN, Stare, Cifra afaceri, Juridic
Search by CUI 37044065 returns S.O.S. UTILAJE CO S.R.L.
Juridic column shows dosare count (2) with warning icon
Clicking company name navigates to company profile
frontend_company_page_location_links: Company profile shows clickable location links

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location browsing feature complete. Routes: /judete (list all 42 counties), /judet/{slug} (list localities in county), /judet/{slug}/{localitate} (list companies in locality with search and pagination). API endpoints: /api/locations/judete, /api/locations/judet/{slug}, /api/locations/judet/{slug}/{localitate}. Test company CUI 37044065 (S.O.S. UTILAJE CO S.R.L.) in Toplita, Harghita has 2 dosare (has_legal_issues=true). Company profile page has clickable location links that navigate to the location pages. Header has 'Judete' nav link.
